sentences.arabic: يَحْتَفِلُ المُسْلِمُونَ بِعِيدِ الفِطْرِ بَعْدَ نِهَايَةِ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ.
sentences.translation: Muslimani slave Ramazanski bajram nakon završetka mjeseca ramazana.
sentences.translationEn: Muslims celebrate Eid al-Fitr after the end of the month of Ramadan.

sentences.arabic: يَلْبَسُ الأَطْفَالُ مَلَابِسَ جَدِيدَةً وَيَزُورُونَ الأَقَارِبَ وَالجِيرَانَ.
sentences.translation: Djeca oblače novu odjeću i posjećuju rodbinu i komšije.
sentences.translationEn: Children wear new clothes and visit relatives and neighbors.

sentences.arabic: يُعْطِي الكِبَارُ الصِّغَارَ مَبَالِغَ مَالِيَّةً تُسَمَّى 'العِيدِيَّةَ'.
sentences.translation: Odrasli daju djeci novčane iznose koji se nazivaju 'bajramluk'.
sentences.translationEn: Adults give children amounts of money called 'Eidiya.'

sentences.arabic: تَحْضُرُ الأُمَّهَاتُ حَلْوِيَّاتٍ شَهِيَّةً مِثْلَ المَعْمُولِ.
sentences.translation: Majke pripremaju ukusne kolače poput mamula.
sentences.translationEn: Mothers prepare delicious sweets like maamoul.

sentences.arabic: يَعُمُّ الفَرَحُ وَالسُّرُورُ فِي كُلِّ مَكَانٍ خِلَالَ أَيَّامِ العِيدِ.
sentences.translation: Radost i veselje se šire svuda tokom bajramskih dana.
sentences.translationEn: Joy and happiness spread everywhere during the days of Eid.
